glosses.en: “Lipstick tree" or "annatto tree". It is best known for its seeds, which are covered in a waxy, red-orange aril that yields annatto, a natural food coloring and condiment used in cuisines worldwide. The plant also has traditional uses as a dye for textiles and body paint, and its seeds contain compounds with potential health benefits.
